name: pulumi-registry-list-resources
description: List all resource types for a given provider and module

provider.description: The cloud provider (e.g., 'aws', 'azure', 'gcp', 'random') or github.com/org/repo for Git-hosted components

version.description: The provider version to use (e.g., '6.0.0'). If not specified, uses the latest available version.
